prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北林业大学为211工程 、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第115名（2026年），属于中游211院校，层次稳定；该校在近年声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度总 排名第59位，评价为"较热"，短视频平台曝光以张雪峰推荐和校园风光为主，整体关注度中等偏上，对报考热度有温和正面作用）；该校传统优势为林业工程、林学、风景园林等农林特色学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业在2024 年专业热度分析中均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，东北林业大学在河北省物理类投放有计算机类、电子信息类、电气类等热门专业，对考生有一定吸引力。河北省物理类考生2021年21 6153人→2025年363040人，持续增长；2026年总考生609800人，按近年比例估算物理类约364800人，较2025年略增约0.48%，竞争略有加剧。省控线方面，河北省物理类本科批2024 年448分→2025年459分，上升11分，反映整体竞争趋紧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 28,175 → 30,033 → 50,798 → 39,432 → 40,925. In 2023, there was an abnormal large backward shift (affected by factors such as the provincial control line drop that year), and in 2024 it significantly rebounded to 39,432, then slightly shifted back to 40,925 in 2025. In the past two years, the ranking fluctuated around 40,000, with the 2025 baseline approximately 40,925. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 155 in 2021, 156 in 2022, 155 in 2023, 153 in 2024, 168 in 2025, and 170 in 2026, an increase of 2 students (+1.19%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 115th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), belonging to mid-tier 211 institutions with stable level. In recent reputation monitoring, no significant negative public opinion incidents have occurred. The university's Douyin popularity ranks 59th overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with short video platform exposure mainly featuring Zhang Xuefeng's recommendations and campus scenery, overall attention moderately high, having a mild positive effect on application heat. The university's traditional strengths are forestry engineering, forestry, landscape architecture, and other agriculture and forestry characteristic disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., were rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis. Northeast Forestry University offers popular majors like Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Electrical Class, etc., in Hebei Province Physics Category, attracting some candidates. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province increased from 216,153 in 2021 to 363,040 in 2025, continuously growing. In 2026, total candidates are 609,800, with Physics Category estimated at about 364,800 based on recent proportions, a slight increase of about 0.48% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Regarding provincial control lines, Hebei Province Physics Category undergraduate batch went from 448 points in 2024 to 459 points in 2025, an increase of 11 points, reflecting overall tightening competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 40,925, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 2 students (+1.19%), a slight increase in Hebei Province Physics Category candidates, a rise in the provincial control line, and moderately high Douyin popularity, competition is expected to slightly intensify but offset by the expansion. The predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking is approximately 41,167, with a range of 40,667–41,667.
